title: cyperus sanguinolentus f. neurotropis
intro: Cyperus sanguinolentus f. neurotropis, also known as the red papyrus or purple sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyperus sanguinolentus f. neurotropis can be used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
